BFAR stated that all shellfish gathered from the two towns are now safe

stories.title: Pia Cayetano revokes invite to 18 ‘ex-Marines’ in flood control probe
stories.summary: MANILA, Philippines — The invitation to the 18 alleged ex-Marines, along with their legal counsel, Atty. Levito Baligod, to appear before the Senate blue ribbon committee has supposedly been withdrawn. Baligod shared in a social media post on Tuesday a screenshot of an email from the Blue Ribbon Oversight Office that was sent to him

stories.title: Bohol provincial government restores regular workweek
stories.summary: TAGBILARAN CITY, Bohol — Government offices at the Bohol Provincial Capitol have returned to the regular five-day workweek following the issuance of an executive order lifting the province’s temporary four-day workweek arrangement. Gov. Erico Aristotle Aumentado signed Executive Order No. 34, Series of 2026, directing all provincial government offices, departments, divisions, and units to resume
